---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] Short description of bug"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Bug

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Say '...'
2. Tap on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Impact** (answer to the best of your knowledge)
- I suspect this bug affects [ all Skills using the affected feature | several Skills | my Skill ]
- The bug is observable [ all the time | occasionally | only once ] 
- How many customers do you think are affected?

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots or recordings to help explain your problem.

**Affected Alexa Device (please complete the following information):**
 - Domain: [ e.g. Alexa | Alexa+ ]
 - Locale: [ e.g. en-US | en-GB | de-DE ]
 - Category: [ e.g. "All-new Echo Dot", "Echo Show 11", "Mobile App", etc. ]
 - Device Software Version (see Alexa App > Settings > Device Settings > [Your Device] > About)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
